meta.name: Heshan Wickramaratne
meta.title: Software Engineer
meta.description: Software Engineer with 5+ years of experience designing and building scalable full-stack applications, cloud-native platforms, and distributed backend systems.

hero.subtitle: Software Engineer — Full Stack | Cloud-Native Systems | DevOps Engineering
hero.description: Software Engineer with 5+ years of experience designing and building scalable full-stack applications, cloud-native platforms, and distributed backend systems within fast-paced product engineering environments.

about.title: ABOUT
bio: Software Engineer with 5+ years of experience designing and building scalable full-stack applications, cloud-native platforms, and distributed backend systems within fast-paced product engineering environments. Experienced across TypeScript, Node.js, Go, React, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD automation.

Core contributor to a production SaaS platform (SkyU), delivering scalable microservices, deployment automation, and modern engineering workflows for Australian clients. Published author with research in system design and technical communication.
Beyond engineering, I'm a competitive swimmer of 19+ years, ILS certified lifeguard, and enjoy generative art, 3D modelling, creative coding, fitness and music.

items.description: Contributed to the ongoing development and optimisation of SkyU, supporting scalable cloud-native platform capabilities and DevOps automation initiatives. Developed backend services and API-driven microservices using Node.js, Go, AWS, and modern distributed architectural patterns. Participated in CI/CD automation, deployment workflows, containerisation, and engineering process improvements using Docker and GitHub Actions. Integrated AI-driven document processing capabilities using AWS Bedrock within production systems.

Head hunted after graduation as part of a team put together to create and take a product (SkyU) to market (Target audience in Melbourne Australia) within a fixed time. Core developer on SkyU, contributing to the design and delivery of scalable full-stack applications and cloud-native backend systems. Developed backend services and API-driven microservices using Node.js, NestJS, Go, AWS, and cloud-native architectural patterns. Developed frontend features using React and TypeScript, integrating user-facing applications with backend services and cloud infrastructure components. Contributed to systems design discussions focused on scalability, maintainability, deployment efficiency, and platform reliability. Participated in CI/CD automation, deployment optimisation, containerisation, and engineering process improvements within agile product environments.

Awarded Most Outstanding Intern (2021) for exceptional technical contribution and ownership. Contributed to full-stack development of internal systems using React, Node.js, Java, and AWS. Built and integrated features using serverless architectures, improving scalability and maintainability. Developed interactive 3D web components using Three.js for internal applications.

achievements.title: KEY ACHIEVEMENTS
items: Core contributor to SkyU, a production cloud-native automation platform, helping deliver scalable backend systems and full-stack platform capabilities for multiple clients.
Designed and implemented API-driven microservices and distributed backend services using modern cloud-native architectural patterns.
Built and optimised CI/CD pipelines, deployment workflows, and containerised cloud infrastructure using Docker, Kubernetes, and GitHub Actions.
Developed full-stack platform features using React and TypeScript, integrating frontend applications with backend services and cloud infrastructure.
Integrated AI-driven document processing capabilities using AWS Bedrock within production systems.
Awarded Most Outstanding Intern (99x) for exceptional technical contribution, ownership, and engineering initiative.
Published author (Documon, ICSCCM 2023, SPIE), demonstrating strong technical communication, systems thinking, and research capability.

items.notes: Specialisation: Cloud Computing, Distributed Systems, and Big Data Processing
Valedictorian & Gold Medallist (Class of 2023) | Batch Top (2019, 2020, 2021, 2023)

items.name: Sarah Mitchell
items.text: Heshan consistently delivered high-quality code and demonstrated exceptional problem-solving abilities. His contributions to our cloud-native platform were invaluable, and his ability to mentor junior developers while delivering complex features made him a key asset to our team.

items.name: James Chen
items.text: Working with Heshan was a pleasure. His deep understanding of distributed systems and cloud architecture helped us scale our microservices infrastructure significantly. He brings both technical excellence and great collaboration skills to every project.

items.name: Priya Sharma
items.text: Heshan's ability to translate complex technical requirements into scalable solutions is remarkable. He played a crucial role in taking our product from concept to market within a challenging timeline, always maintaining high code quality standards.

items.name: David Thompson
items.text: Heshan is one of the most dedicated engineers I've worked with. His expertise in DevOps practices and CI/CD automation transformed our deployment pipelines, reducing release times by 60%. Highly recommend for any cloud-native initiatives.

items.name: Emma Wilson
items.text: During his internship, Heshan showed incredible growth and initiative. His work on the 3D visualization components and serverless architectures exceeded our expectations. Truly deserving of the Most Outstanding Intern award.

contact.title: LET'S CONNECT
contact.description: Always open to new opportunities, collaborations, or a good conversation about technology, design, and engineering.
